
Data Summary
=====================================

Row
-------------------------------------

### Data Availability

```{r data_avail_plot, eval=!is.null(mv$data_availability)}
da <- mv$data_availability
da$present_num <- as.integer(da$present)

# Compute fractional-year x position for any row that has a quarter.
da_has_q <- "quarter" %in% names(da) && any(!is.na(da$quarter))
if (da_has_q) {
  n_q_da   <- max(as.integer(da$quarter[!is.na(da$quarter)]), na.rm = TRUE)
  da$x_pos <- ifelse(
    !is.na(da$quarter),
    da$year + (as.integer(da$quarter) - 1L) / n_q_da,
    da$year
  )
} else {
  da$x_pos <- da$year
}

fc        <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = fleets)
da_stocks <- if ("stock" %in% names(da) &&
                 length(unique(da$stock)) > 1L)
               intersect(areas, unique(da$stock)) else NULL

dtype_order <- c("Catch", "Index", "Length comp")
dtypes_used <- dtype_order[dtype_order %in% unique(da$datatype)]
dtype_pos   <- setNames(seq_along(dtypes_used), dtypes_used)
n_fl        <- length(fleets)
fl_offsets  <- if (n_fl > 1L) seq(0.2, -0.2, length.out = n_fl) else 0

if (!is.null(da_stocks)) {
  stock_panels <- list()
  shown_legs   <- character(0)

  for (si in seq_along(da_stocks)) {
    stk <- da_stocks[si]
    p   <- plot_ly()
    for (j in seq_along(fleets)) {
      fl <- fleets[j]
      for (dt in dtypes_used) {
        sub <- da[da$fleet == fl & da$datatype == dt &
                    da$present & da$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE]
        if (nrow(sub) == 0L) next
        show_leg <- !(fl %in% shown_legs)
        if (show_leg) shown_legs <- c(shown_legs, fl)
        y_val <- dtype_pos[dt] + fl_offsets[j]
        hover_x <- if (da_has_q && !is.na(sub$quarter[1L]))
          paste0(sub$year, "-Q", sub$quarter) else as.character(sub$year)
        p <- add_markers(
          p = p,
          x = sub$x_pos,
          y = rep(y_val, nrow(sub)),
          marker = list(color = fc[fl], size = 5, symbol = "circle"),
          name = fl, legendgroup = fl,
          showlegend = show_leg,
          text = hover_x,
          hovertemplate = paste0(fl, " ", dt, " %{text}<extra></extra>")
        )
      }
    }
    lay_s <- modelVis::mv_layout()
    lay_s$yaxis$tickvals <- seq_along(dtypes_used)
    lay_s$yaxis$ticktext <- dtypes_used
    lay_s$yaxis$range    <- c(0.5, length(dtypes_used) + 0.5)
    lay_s$yaxis$title    <- ""
    lay_s$annotations    <- list(mv_top_label(label = stk))
    lay_s$showlegend     <- FALSE
    lay_s$margin$l       <- 100
    p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay_s))
    stock_panels[[length(stock_panels) + 1L]] <- p
  }
  p_out <- subplot(
    stock_panels,
    nrows   = length(stock_panels),
    shareX  = TRUE, titleY = TRUE,
    margin  = 0.04
  )
  p_out <- layout(
    p = p_out,
    xaxis      = list(title = "Year"),
    title      = "Data Availability",
    showlegend = TRUE
  )
  modelVis::mv_config(p = p_out)

} else {
  p          <- plot_ly()
  shown_legs <- character(0)
  for (j in seq_along(fleets)) {
    fl <- fleets[j]
    for (dt in dtypes_used) {
      sub <- da[da$datatype == dt & da$fleet == fl & da$present, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(sub) == 0L) next
      show_leg <- !(fl %in% shown_legs)
      if (show_leg) shown_legs <- c(shown_legs, fl)
      y_val <- dtype_pos[dt] + fl_offsets[j]
      hover_x <- if (da_has_q && dt == "Length comp")
        paste0(sub$year, "-Q", sub$quarter) else as.character(sub$year)
      p <- add_markers(
        p = p,
        x = sub$x_pos,
        y = rep(y_val, nrow(sub)),
        marker = list(color = fc[fl], size = 5, symbol = "circle"),
        name = fl, legendgroup = fl,
        showlegend = show_leg,
        text = hover_x,
        hovertemplate = paste0(fl, " ", dt, " %{text}<extra></extra>")
      )
    }
  }
  lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay$yaxis$tickvals <- seq_along(dtypes_used)
  lay$yaxis$ticktext <- dtypes_used
  lay$yaxis$range    <- c(0.5, length(dtypes_used) + 0.5)
  lay$yaxis$title    <- ""
  lay$xaxis$title    <- "Year"
  lay$title          <- "Data Availability"
  lay$showlegend     <- TRUE
  lay$margin$l       <- 100
  p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
  modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
}
```

### Model Information

```{r model_info}
dim_label <- if (has_len && is.null(mv$age_comp_fits)) "Lengths" else "Ages"
info_df <- data.frame(
  Property = c(
    "Model type", "Label",
    "Years", dim_label,
    "Sexes", "Fleets",
    "Commercial", "Survey",
    "Areas",
    "Length comps", "Discards",
    "Density-dep M", "MCMC"
  ),
  Value = c(
    meta$model_type,
    meta$label,
    paste(min(years), "-", max(years)),
    paste(min(ages), "-", max(ages)),
    paste(sexes, collapse = ", "),
    paste(fleets, collapse = ", "),
    paste(comm_fleets, collapse = ", "),
    paste(survey_fleets, collapse = ", "),
    paste(areas, collapse = ", "),
    ifelse(test = has_len, yes = "Yes", no = "No"),
    ifelse(test = has_disc, yes = "Yes", no = "No"),
    ifelse(test = is_ddm, yes = "Yes", no = "No"),
    ifelse(test = has_mcmc, yes = "Yes", no = "No")
  ),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
knitr::kable(
  x = info_df, caption = "Model summary",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```
